title: Tether freezes $344 million in USDT on Tron after wallets flagged by US authorities
message_html: Tether freezes $344 million in USDT on Tron after wallets flagged by US authorities ...
snippet: Tether says it froze $344 million in USDT on Tron in coordination with OFAC and U.S. law enforcement, one of the largest freezes on record.

title: JPMorgan says DeFi exploits and stagnant TVL continue to limit institutional appeal
message_html: JPMorgan says DeFi exploits and stagnant TVL continue to limit institutional appeal ...
snippet: JPMorgan said persistent hacks appear to push investors toward Tether's USDT, as users move funds out of DeFi during stress.
